name_cn:
Genuine quality
5BG288, Miu's new Isetan limited tote bag, this year's absolutely explosive style. New limited edition corduroy fabric, paired with premium leather texture for a high-end look. The bag is soft yet structured, with a petite size design that is more refined. A casual and lazy temperament, 100% head-turning rate when worn on the street. Hand-stitched leather logo on the surface, brand new linen lining inside, with two zippered pockets and an adjustable leather shoulder strap. Dimensions 22X 14X11Cm, comes with original packaging.
